---
title: "Untitled"
output: html_document
---


```{r}
#使用reticulate包中的use_python函数
library(reticulate)
#py_available()#系统已安装Python
use_python("D:/Anaconda/envs/tf1/python.exe")
use_condaenv("D:/Anaconda/envs/tf1")
py_config()
```

# 尝试使用Python
```{python}
import numpy as np
import tensorflow as tf
import pandas as pd
a = np.array([1,2,3])
print(a)
```
